strategy: Team fight (22k, Darkmoor Graveyard). Hit with Life (+30%) or Fire/Storm (+15%); avoid Ice (60%) and Myth/Death (30%).
Setup is punished three ways: any blade Freezes (stuns) the caster, any shield/absorb gets Pierced, and any single harmful charm gets Bad Juju'd. Bring Conviction to shrug off the Freeze/stun.
Use multi-target curses — Mass Feint and Plague don't trigger the Bad Juju, unlike single Weakness/Feint.
Wards are pointless here (they get Pierced) and he has 55% pierce himself, so lean on resist and heals over shields.
Every 5th round he unloads a big combo (Katabatic Wind / Saga + Mystic Colossus / Doom and Gloom + Call of Khrulhu) at the lowest-health wizard — top that wizard first.
Layer multi-target traps, blade the hitter through a Conviction window, and burst; watch the round 3/6/9 Shift hits (800 Life, 1,000 Fire, 1,200 Moon).
cheatNotes: Cast a blade and he Freezes (stuns) the caster — use Conviction to ignore it.
Global spells trigger the Freeze too.
Cast a helpful ward (shield/absorb) and he Pierces the target — don't rely on shields.
Spells that give the caster a ward (like Sabertooth) make him Pierce himself.
His minions also Steal Ward any remaining wards off you.
Cast a single harmful charm and he Bad Jujus you.
Secondary curse effects (like Efreet's) trigger the Bad Juju too.
Multi-target curses like Plague do NOT trigger it — use those.
Each round in this sub-cycle he Frozen Armors himself or a minion.
Round 5 of it (and every 15th) he casts Katabatic Wind, Mass Ice Trap, Iceblade, and Abominable Weaver at the lowest-health wizard — top that wizard first.
Each round in another sub-cycle he Buff Minions himself or a minion.
Round 5 of it he casts Saga of Heroes, Mass Myth Trap, Mythblade, and Mystic Colossus.
Each round in another sub-cycle he Feints (+75%) a random wizard.
Round 5 of it he casts Doom and Gloom (-75%), Deathblade, Mass Death Trap, and Call of Khrulhu.
End of round 3 he casts Shift Chaney for 800 Life.
End of round 6 he casts Shift Akhtang for 1,000 Fire.
End of round 9 he casts Shift Blackwater for 1,200 Moon.
